verses.text: Every seventh year the land rests, a sabbath to the LORD. Land's sabbath. Even the soil keeps God's rest.
Every seventh year the land rests, a sabbath to the LORD. Land's sabbath. Even the soil keeps God's rest.
Every seventh year the land rests, a sabbath to the LORD. Land's sabbath. Even the soil keeps God's rest.
Every seventh year the land rests, a sabbath to the LORD. Land's sabbath. Even the soil keeps God's rest.
What grows of itself is for all to eat freely. Provision. The rest-year feeds all alike.
What grows of itself is for all to eat freely. Provision. The rest-year feeds all alike.
What grows of itself is for all to eat freely. Provision. The rest-year feeds all alike.
The fiftieth year is the jubilee, proclaiming 'liberty throughout all the land.' Jubilee. Freedom and return are proclaimed.
The fiftieth year is the jubilee, proclaiming 'liberty throughout all the land.' Jubilee. Freedom and return are proclaimed.
The fiftieth year is the jubilee, proclaiming 'liberty throughout all the land.' Jubilee. Freedom and return are proclaimed.
The fiftieth year is the jubilee, proclaiming 'liberty throughout all the land.' Jubilee. Freedom and return are proclaimed.
The fiftieth year is the jubilee, proclaiming 'liberty throughout all the land.' Jubilee. Freedom and return are proclaimed.
In the jubilee each returns to his possession; deal not unjustly. Return. Land sales reckon to the jubilee.
In the jubilee each returns to his possession; deal not unjustly. Return. Land sales reckon to the jubilee.
In the jubilee each returns to his possession; deal not unjustly. Return. Land sales reckon to the jubilee.
In the jubilee each returns to his possession; deal not unjustly. Return. Land sales reckon to the jubilee.
In the jubilee each returns to his possession; deal not unjustly. Return. Land sales reckon to the jubilee.
Keep the statutes and dwell safely; God will command His blessing. Blessing. God provides for the year of rest.
Keep the statutes and dwell safely; God will command His blessing. Blessing. God provides for the year of rest.
Keep the statutes and dwell safely; God will command His blessing. Blessing. God provides for the year of rest.
Keep the statutes and dwell safely; God will command His blessing. Blessing. God provides for the year of rest.
Keep the statutes and dwell safely; God will command His blessing. Blessing. God provides for the year of rest.
The land is the LORD's; it may not be sold for ever. God's land. They hold it as His tenants.
The land is the LORD's; it may not be sold for ever. God's land. They hold it as His tenants.
A kinsman may redeem sold land; in the jubilee it returns. Redemption. The near kinsman buys it back.
A kinsman may redeem sold land; in the jubilee it returns. Redemption. The near kinsman buys it back.
A kinsman may redeem sold land; in the jubilee it returns. Redemption. The near kinsman buys it back.
A kinsman may redeem sold land; in the jubilee it returns. Redemption. The near kinsman buys it back.
A house in a walled city may be redeemed within a year. Houses. Different rules for city dwellings.
A house in a walled city may be redeemed within a year. Houses. Different rules for city dwellings.
A house in a walled city may be redeemed within a year. Houses. Different rules for city dwellings.
The Levites' cities may always be redeemed. The Levites. Their inheritance is secured.
The Levites' cities may always be redeemed. The Levites. Their inheritance is secured.
The Levites' cities may always be redeemed. The Levites. Their inheritance is secured.
Relieve the poor brother; take no usury of him. No usury. The poor are helped, not exploited.
Relieve the poor brother; take no usury of him. No usury. The poor are helped, not exploited.
Relieve the poor brother; take no usury of him. No usury. The poor are helped, not exploited.
Relieve the poor brother; take no usury of him. No usury. The poor are helped, not exploited.
A poor brother sold to thee serves as a hired servant, not a slave. Not a slave. A brother is treated with dignity.
A poor brother sold to thee serves as a hired servant, not a slave. Not a slave. A brother is treated with dignity.
A poor brother sold to thee serves as a hired servant, not a slave. Not a slave. A brother is treated with dignity.
A poor brother sold to thee serves as a hired servant, not a slave. Not a slave. A brother is treated with dignity.
A poor brother sold to thee serves as a hired servant, not a slave. Not a slave. A brother is treated with dignity.
Bondmen may be taken of the heathen round about. Bondmen. Slaves are taken from outside.
Bondmen may be taken of the heathen round about. Bondmen. Slaves are taken from outside.
Bondmen may be taken of the heathen round about. Bondmen. Slaves are taken from outside.
A brother sold to a stranger may be redeemed by his kin. Redeemed. The kinsman buys him back.
A brother sold to a stranger may be redeemed by his kin. Redeemed. The kinsman buys him back.
A brother sold to a stranger may be redeemed by his kin. Redeemed. The kinsman buys him back.
His price is reckoned to the jubilee. Reckoned. The years are counted fairly.
His price is reckoned to the jubilee. Reckoned. The years are counted fairly.
His price is reckoned to the jubilee. Reckoned. The years are counted fairly.
In the jubilee he goes free, for 'unto me the children of Israel are servants.' God's servants. Israel belongs to God alone.
In the jubilee he goes free, for 'unto me the children of Israel are servants.' God's servants. Israel belongs to God alone.
